series_metadata.series_title: Policy and Strategic Analysis Research Projects
series_metadata.series_description: Research projects (either DODD along or with other agencies or third parties) on relevant topics like employment issues in the developmentally disabled field, the ID/D population, or program evaluations.

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: Retain in agency for five years, then contact State Archives for review and possible transfer. Dispose of if not transferred., Electronic: Delete
